title: Sweet And Silky Portuguese Peach Bhuna Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and halal-friendly Portuguese dish featuring sweet peach juice, a savory bhuna sauce, and tender peaches cooked to perfection.

ingredients.name: Peach Juice Concentrate or Sugar (for sweetness)

instructions: Chop the peaches into small cubes.
Heat a bit of oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and chili flakes, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add chicken broth or water to the pan with the chopped peaches, and bring to a boil.
Stir in corn starch mixed with peach juice concentrate or sugar to achieve desired sweetness. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat and let it simmer for 5-7 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
